name: lyrics-kara
description: Static lyrics index for lyrics.kara251.com, deployed with Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.dev: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 4174 -d dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler@4 pages deploy dist --project-name lyrics-kara --branch main
scripts.cf:project:create: npx wrangler@4 pages project create lyrics-kara --production-branch main
